x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces IBO's already-live reference material (publications via the NYC.gov Content API v2, and 20 fiscal tables via NYC Open Data) as clean agent tools, and adds ask_ibo — the net-new write workflow for IBO's single citizen transaction, today only a web form / email.

server.name: io.nyc.ibo
server.title: NYC Independent Budget Office (IBO)
server.description: Agent-native access to the New York City Independent Budget Office — the city's nonpartisan budget watchdog. Search IBO publications (reports, testimony, letters, budget options, explainers, interactives), query long-form fiscal data (revenue, spending, capital, debt, positions), school spending, and distributional tax/income data, and submit an 'Ask IBO' data request — IBO's one citizen transaction, today a form/email only.
server.instructions: Use find_publications / get_publication to locate IBO analysis by topic, publication type, or fiscal year (this reads IBO's undocumented NYC.gov Content API, ~1,145 publications). find_data_tables / get_data_table catalog IBO's 20 Open Data fiscal tables; note most are WIDE (one column per fiscal year). find_fiscal_series returns those tables pivoted to long-form (series, lineItem, fiscalYear, value) for revenue, spending, capital, debt, and positions. find_school_spending covers education spending/indicators; find_tax_distribution covers income and tax by AGI band. ask_ibo (net-new) submits a data/analysis question to IBO — it is the only write, mutates state by creating a request, so confirm the question and contact details with the user before submitting; IBO answers by email or a published response, not instantly.

tools.name: find_publications
tools.title: Find Publications
tools.description: Search IBO publications (reports, testimony, letters, budget options, explainers, interactives) by publication type, topic, fiscal year, date range, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_publication
tools.title: Get Publication
tools.description: Fetch a single IBO publication by its URL slug.

tools.name: find_data_tables
tools.title: Find Data Tables
tools.description: List IBO's Open Data fiscal tables (catalog) by asset type, table shape (wide-fiscal-year / distribution-by-agi), or free text.

tools.name: get_data_table
tools.title: Get Data Table
tools.description: Fetch one IBO Open Data table catalog entry (columns, shape, update cadence) by Socrata ID.

tools.name: find_fiscal_series
tools.title: Find Fiscal Series
tools.description: Query long-form fiscal observations — the pivoted view of IBO's wide tables: revenue & spending, non-tax revenue, categorical aid, agency expenditures, full-time positions, capital expenditures, debt outstanding, and debt service — by series, line item, agency, or fiscal-year range.

tools.name: find_school_spending
tools.title: Find School Spending
tools.description: Query NYC public-school spending and education indicators (School Spending Since 1990 + Education Indicators) by category or year range.

tools.name: find_tax_distribution
tools.title: Find Tax Distribution
tools.description: Query distributional tax and income data by AGI band — personal income, income by type, tax liability, EITC/credits, and tax-revenue lines by type.

tools.name: list_my_data_requests
tools.title: List My Ask IBO Requests
tools.description: List the authenticated requester's own Ask IBO data requests and their status — a surface that does not exist today (Ask IBO is a one-way form/email).

tools.name: get_data_request
tools.title: Get Ask IBO Request
tools.description: Fetch a single Ask IBO data request and its status/answer by request ID.

tools.name: ask_ibo
tools.title: Ask IBO (Submit a Data Request)
tools.description: Submit an 'Ask IBO' data / analysis question — IBO's single citizen transaction and the NET-NEW write workflow with no public API today (currently a web form or email to info@ibo.nyc.gov). Mutates state by creating a request; confirm the question, topic, and contact details with the user before submitting. IBO responds by email or a published answer, not instantly.
